untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental analysis indicators not available in price/technical library: (1) 5-year earnings growth rate, (2) YoY earnings growth for last 2 quarters, (3) earnings growth deceleration detection. These require earnings data and multi-quarter comparisons beyond the allowed technical indicators. Price range ($15-$20) and RSI approximation are translatable, but earnings quality validation cannot be expressed with available indicators.
translation_notes: Translated price range entry conditions to close price bounds. Used rsi_14 > 50 as proxy for 'proven momentum out of depression' since exact earnings growth metrics are unavailable. Exit condition on price < $15 is directly translatable. The core thesis about earnings quality and growth consistency cannot be mechanically encoded without fundamental data access.
